ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the location based on the number of homes built */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the location */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "home_types" (
  "home_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home type */,
  "home_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the home type (e.g., 'Built between 1980 to 1989', 'Built 1939 or earlier') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the home type */,
  "min_year" INTEGER /* Minimum year a home in this type was built */,
  "max_year" INTEGER /* Maximum year a home in this type was built */,
  "average_square_footage" REAL /* Average square footage of homes in this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("home_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "homes" (
  "home_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the home is built */,
  "home_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home type */,
  "number_of_homes" INTEGER /* Number of homes of this type in the location */,
  "insurance_cost" REAL /* Insurance cost for homes of this type in the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the home */,
  "square_footage" REAL /* Square footage of the home */,
  "number_of_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms in the home */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the home was built */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the home (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("home_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_homes_home_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_type_id") REFERENCES home_types ("home_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_homes_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_costs" (
  "insurance_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance cost */,
  "home_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home */,
  "insurance_cost" REAL /* Insurance cost for the home */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the insurance cost became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the insurance cost expires */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., comprehensive, basic) */,
  "deductible" REAL /* Deductible amount for the insurance policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_costs_home_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_id") REFERENCES homes ("home_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the administrator is responsible for */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the administrator account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_admins_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the report is for */,
  "home_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home type the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_home_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_type_id") REFERENCES home_types ("home_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
